zh.lifeSummary: 當Bartel Gaertner於1525年出生在德國薩辛姆尼次時，他的父親Jorg Gaertner34歲，母親Mrs Jorg Gaertner30歲。他於1552年1月17日與Katharina Prockner結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1604年在他的家鄉享年79歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bartel Gaertner于1525年出生在德国薩辛姆尼次时，他的父亲Jorg Gaertner34岁，母亲Mrs Jorg Gaertner30岁。他于1552年1月17日与Katharina Prockner结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1604年在他的家乡享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gaertner
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Franz, Helmut, Kurt, Dieter, Erna, Ernst, Gerhard, Hans, Irmgard, Karl Heinz, Ulrich.

variants.name: Gartner
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Kurt, Gerda, Johann, Lorenz, Otto, Wolfgang, Bernd, Dieter, Frieda, Fritz, Gerhard.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic) (also Gärtner): occupational name for a gardener or vintner, from an agent derivative of Middle High German garte ‘enclosure, garden’. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine) and in Slovenia (see 2 below). Compare Gaertner and Gardner .
Slovenian: of German origin (see 1 above). In North America, this surname may also be an altered form of the Slovenized variant Gartnar.

nameMeanings.name: Bartel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of New Testament origin, the name of an apostle mentioned in all the synoptic gospels (Matthew, Mark, and Luke) and in the Acts of the Apostles. It is an Aramaic formation meaning ‘son of Talmai’, and has been assumed by many scholars to be a byname of the apostle Nathaniel . Talmai is a Hebrew name, said to mean ‘abounding in furrows’ (Numbers 13:22).

en.lifeSummary: When Bartel Gaertner was born in 1525, in Chemnitz, Saxony, Germany, his father, Jorg Gaertner, was 34 and his mother, Mrs Jorg Gaertner, was 30. He married Katharina Prockner on 17 January 1552. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1604, in his hometown, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bartel Gaertner est né en 1525, à Chemnitz, Sachsen, Allemagne, son père, Jorg Gaertner, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Mrs Jorg Gaertner, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Katharina Prockner le 17 janvier 1552. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1604, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bartel Gaertner 1525 in Chemnitz, Sachsen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jorg Gaertner 34 und seine Mutter Mrs Jorg Gaertner 30. Er hat am 17. Januar 1552 Katharina Prockner geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1604 im Alter von 79 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bartel Gaertner è nato il nel 1525 nel Chemnitz, Sachsen, Germania, il suo padre, Jorg Gaertner, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Mrs Jorg Gaertner, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Katharina Prockner il 17 gennaio 1552. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1604, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 79 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Bartel Gaertnerが1525年にドイツサチセンケムニッツで生まれた時，父Jorg Gaertnerは34歳，母Mrs Jorg Gaertnerは30歳であった。1552年1月17日にKatharina Procknerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1604年に故郷で79歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Bartel Gaertner(이)가 1525년 독일 작센 체니츠에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jorg Gaertner(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Jorg Gaertner(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1552년 1월 17일 Katharina Prockner(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1604년 그의 고향에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bartel Gaertner nasceu em 1525, em Chemnitz, Sachsen, Alemanha, seu pai, Jorg Gaertner, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Jorg Gaertner, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Katharina Prockner em 17 de janeiro de 1552. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1604, em sua cidade natal, com 79 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bartel Gaertner родился в 1525 г. в местности чемниц, сачсен, Германия, его отцу по имени Jorg Gaertner было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs Jorg Gaertner, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Katharina Prockner 17 января 1552 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1604 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 79 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Bartel Gaertner nació en 1525, en Chemnitz, Sachsen, Alemania, su papá, Jorg Gaertner, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Mrs Jorg Gaertner, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Katharina Prockner el 17 de enero de 1552. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1604, en su pueblo, a la edad de 79 años.
